title: Moosend Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Read our detailed Moosend review covering features, pricing, pros & cons. Best email marketing tool for small businesses.
h1: Moosend Email Marketing Review: Unlimited Emails at Budget-Friendly Prices
intro: Moosend is an email marketing and automation platform that has been helping businesses reach their customers since 2011. It's particularly well-suited for small businesses and startups looking for affordable email marketing without compromising on essential features like automation, A/B testing, and analytics.
verdict: Moosend delivers excellent value for money, especially for budget-conscious small businesses, thanks to its unlimited emails on paid plans and robust free tier with up to 1,000 subscribers. However, it may lack some advanced segmentation options and integrations that larger enterprises might need. Overall, it's a solid mid-market choice that balances affordability with functionality.
pros: Unlimited emails on all paid plans—you only pay for subscribers, not sending volume
Generous free tier allows up to 1,000 subscribers with full feature access
Comprehensive automation workflows and landing page builder included
Strong ratings (4.7 on G2, 4.4 on Trustpilot) indicate reliable user satisfaction
Real-time analytics and A/B testing built into all plans
cons: Landing page and form builders are functional but lack the polish of dedicated platforms
Limited advanced segmentation compared to enterprise-level competitors like HubSpot
Smaller app ecosystem with fewer third-party integrations than market leaders
pricing_summary: Moosend offers a freemium model with free access for up to 1,000 subscribers, while paid plans start at $9/month and scale based on subscriber count. All paid tiers include unlimited email sends, making it cost-effective for high-volume senders.
best_for_detail: Moosend is ideal for small businesses and bootstrapped startups that need professional email marketing without enterprise-level pricing. It's perfect for teams that prioritize sending volume over advanced features, as the unlimited emails policy removes the biggest cost concern for growing lists.

faq.a: Yes, Moosend offers a free tier that supports up to 1,000 subscribers with full access to core features including automation, A/B testing, and analytics. The free plan never expires, but it's limited to basic functionality without access to some premium integrations.

faq.q: What is Moosend best used for?
faq.a: Moosend excels at email marketing campaigns and marketing automation for small to medium-sized businesses. It's particularly valuable for companies that send high email volumes, as you pay only for subscribers—not per email sent—making it cost-effective for scaling campaigns.

Yes, Moosend is beginner-friendly with an intuitive interface, pre-built automation templates, and helpful documentation. The free tier lets new users explore without commitment, and the included landing page builder and subscription forms make it possible to run complete campaigns without external tools.

faq.q: Does Moosend have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Moosend operates an affiliate program offering 30% recurring commission on referred customers. This makes it attractive for agencies and content creators looking to earn ongoing revenue from referrals, as commissions continue as long as referred customers remain active.
